summary: The artifacts contain major strategic conflicts across target audience, delivery model, and technical feasibility. Revision is required before integration.

issues.title: Engineering delivery model contradicts product direction
issues.evidence: The product artifact assumes a mobile-first app while the engineering artifact proposes an on-premise kiosk deployment with no mobile application.
issues.recommendation: Align the engineering architecture with the mobile app scope or revise the product requirements to reflect kiosk delivery.

issues.title: Finance target market diverges from user request
issues.evidence: The user request and product output focus on busy professionals, but the finance output targets gym operators as the paying customer.
issues.recommendation: Update the commercial strategy to match the intended end-user persona or formally redefine the business model.
